name: Rum or Whiskey Cake Emily Gray
recipeIngredient: 1 package Duncan Hines Butter Yellow Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer, combine the cake mix, pudding, oil, milk, and eggs. Beat until nearly double in volume.
2. Add nuts, almond extract, and shot of rum or whiskey. Pour into a well-greased bundt pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes. Remove from the pan immediately after baking.
4. Mix all glaze ingredients together and pour over hot cake to soak. You can make little holes on top with a toothpick so the glaze can soak deeper.
